locations.name: Main Stage
locations.description: The big one — headliners, dance acts, and the Sunday closing celebration in the Main Stage meadow bowl.

events.title: An All-Star Celebration of Bob Weir
events.performers: All-star ensemble — 2½ hours of musical memories

locations.name: Blue Moon Stage
locations.description: Eclectic bands all weekend; KRVM 91.9 FM broadcasts live from alongside the stage.

events.title: The Chris Chandler & Paul Benoit Show

locations.name: Caravan Stage
locations.description: Middle Eastern music and the famous Caravan Stage Belly Dance Show.

events.title: The Caravan Stage Belly Dance Show
events.performers: Bedouin Spice Orchestra & the Caravan Stage Dancers

locations.name: Chez Ray's Stage
locations.description: Intimate sets and Fair-favorite songwriters, up the Left Bank.

locations.name: Community Village Stage
locations.description: Music, panels, and 50 years of activism in the heart of Community Village.

locations.name: Dance Pavilion
locations.description: Move your body: yoga flows, partner dance, bachata, and hip hop classes all day.

events.title: Shake Your Asana with Laura Black

locations.name: DuCaniveaux Vaudeville Palace
locations.description: Vaudeville, circus, and physical theater in far-upriver Toad Hollow.

events.title: Leapin' Louie: The Upside Down Ocean

locations.name: The Front Porch
locations.description: Comedy, storytelling, and rest for your dancing feet on Wally's Way.

locations.name: Hoarse Chorale Stage
locations.description: Choral and acoustic sets by Chela Mela Meadow; performances recorded live.

locations.name: Kesey Stage
locations.description: Energy Park's stage: physics phun, sustainability talks, and acoustic acts.

events.title: Closing the Loop: Sustainability in Action

locations.name: Monkey Palace
locations.description: Danceable bands under the big tent in Chela Mela Meadow — marimba to New Orleans Americana.

locations.name: Morningwood Odditorium
locations.description: Music and theatrics; the Fremont Players' Peter Pan panto at 12:00 and 2:45 daily.

locations.name: The Alcove
locations.description: A variety stage in Xavanadu; KRVM broadcasts performances live.

locations.name: The Rabbit Hole
locations.description: Spoken word, poetry, and storytelling down the rabbit hole.

locations.name: Spirit Tower
locations.description: Award-winning comedy — clownish bits, sketch, and stand-up.

locations.name: Stage Left
locations.description: Theater in Xavanadu: 'Hats Off!' — can these all-star performers save Vaudeville?

locations.name: W.C. Fields Memorial Stage
locations.description: Physical theater and explosive ensemble comedy on Strawberry Lane.

locations.name: Youth Stage
locations.description: Made for little hearts — kids' performers, sing-alongs, and teen showcases.

events.title: Linda Yapp the Lemon Drop Fairy

locations.name: White Bird Rock Medicine — Little Wing
Dragon Plaza
locations.description: The Fair's front plaza — admissions, the dragon, ATM, bag check, and the start of every adventure.

locations.name: Xavanadu
locations.description: The eastern realm: Dance Pavilion, Flow Zone, Stage Left, food carts, and the Saturday Market.

locations.name: Chela Mela Meadow
locations.description: Riverside meadow of play: jugglers, Monkey Palace, chill spaces, Dharma Garden yoga at 2:00 and 4:00.

locations.name: My Camp
locations.description: Tyler's camp spot — same place every year. Home base.

locations.name: Main Gate
locations.description: Public main entrance off the parking meadows.

locations.name: Maple Gate
locations.description: Vehicle entrance from Territorial Hwy side; tagged 'OCF Entrance (Maple Gate)'.

locations.name: Watergate
locations.description: North gate near The Ritz / upper river area.

locations.name: Ho Gate
locations.description: South entrance path; connects to Ho Road service road.

locations.name: Dragon Admissions
locations.description: Admissions lanes feeding Dragon Plaza.

locations.name: Bus Admissions
locations.description: Admissions for LTD bus arrivals; bus stop at 44.05567,-123.373525.

locations.name: Yearly Built Bridge (to Far Side)
locations.description: Temporary bridge rebuilt each year crossing to the Far Side; explains routing-graph disconnect across river.

locations.name: Refer Bridge
locations.description: Crosses Indian Creek near admissions; sibling of Reefer Pass path.

locations.name: Recycle Camp
locations.description: Central recycling operation; ~15 additional recycling/waste points mapped across grounds (see raw/fairground-features.json).

locations.name: The Ritz
locations.description: Legendary sauna/showers, also hosts a stage. Hours tagged 05:00-15:00,16:00-04:00.

locations.name: Spirit Lake
locations.description: Pond inside the loop near Star Lane.

locations.name: Troubleshooting
locations.description: Ticket/wristband problem desk near Trotter's Field parking.

locations.name: LTD Bus Stop
locations.description: Lane Transit District shuttle drop near Main Gate.

locations.name: Far Side — The Ball Field
locations.description: Across the river via the yearly bridge; camping/staff side.

locations.name: ADA Parking — North Miss Piggy's
locations.description: Closest lot to Main Gate; ADA.

locations.name: Energy Park
locations.description: Sustainability education area, NE of the loop; hosts Kesey Stage vicinity per official map.

locations.name: Community Village
locations.description: Nonprofit/activism village. Estimate ±100 m. (location approximate)

locations.description: Estimate ±120 m. (location approximate)
